zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡上行延续
zh.content:
短线延续震荡上行结构，价格站稳1625上方均线支撑，整体多头优势仍在，但上方接近前高1670一线，存在阶段性整理需求，动能保持

MACD指标维持正值13.43，动能柱扩张显示多头动能占优，短期趋势偏强，但信号线缺失需谨慎确认持续性仍有空间延续观察中

下方支撑关注1646-1650区间及1625均线位置，上方阻力集中在1670突破位，若放量上破或打开至1685空间扩展区

操作上建议保持回调低吸为主，突破1670可顺势跟进，跌破1646则短线止损离场，控制仓位等待确认方向为宜并观察节奏变化中

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum against the US dollar continues to trade in a mildly constructive structure, holding above its short-term moving average and maintaining a gradual sequence of higher lows. Price action between 1646 and 1669 suggests a tightening consolidation after a modest recovery phase. Buyers appear to be defending dips consistently, indicating that momentum remains cautiously supportive rather than aggressively trending. Overall, the market leans slightly bullish while still lacking strong breakout conviction.

Momentum indicators reinforce a cautiously positive bias. The MACD reading at 13.43 signals that upside momentum is still present, though the absence of a visible signal line reading limits confirmation of crossover strength. With RSI data unavailable, momentum assessment relies more heavily on price structure and moving averages. The sustained position above the 20-day SMA suggests trend resilience, but momentum appears moderate rather than impulsive.

Immediate support is located around the 20-day SMA near 1625, with stronger structural support forming between 1600 and 1610 where prior consolidation occurred. A loss of this zone could expose a deeper retracement toward 1560. On the upside, resistance is seen at 1669, the recent high, followed by 1685 and then the psychological 1700 level. Price is currently compressed between these zones.

From a trading perspective, the prevailing structure favors a dip-buying approach while price holds above the 20-day SMA. Long positions may be considered on pullbacks toward 1625–1630 with risk defined below 1620 to protect against breakdown scenarios. For breakout traders, confirmation above 1670 could open room toward 1685 and 1700. Range traders may exploit oscillations between support and resistance until a decisive breakout occurs.
